failedAssertions.reason: OTP notification_delivery record not created - sendVerificationOtpEmail bypasses notification.service.ts. OTP emails are sent via auth.mailer.ts directly, not routed through notification.service.ts which creates the delivery records.

Blocked by empty database: notification_delivery table is empty. Historical evidence shows templateKeys 'booking-confirmation', 'booking-cancellation', 'booking-hold-expired' are used correctly in actual email sends.

blockers.description: Database state empty: procedure_type table has 0 rows, booking table has 0 rows, notification_delivery table has 0 rows. Cannot create citizen booking holds without procedureTypeId.
blockers.quickFix: Database needs seeding with procedure_types and slot data before citizen booking flows can be tested end-to-end.

blockers.description: OTP notification path bypasses notification.service.ts - sendVerificationOtpEmail in auth.mailer.ts sends directly via nodemailer without creating notification_delivery record
blockers.quickFix: Route OTP emails through notification.service.ts or create separate OTP template in notification service.
